config.budget.models_moved_hint: Model budgets are now managed via Provider settings.
config.embeddings.change_warning_banner: ⚠️ Changing embeddings settings will reset the vector database. All existing memories will be lost!
config.embeddings.info_banner: Embeddings power long-term memory. Changes require a full rebuild of the vector database.
config.field.json_array_hint: Enter a JSON array, or a plain comma-separated list of values.
config.https.behind_proxy_notice: Behind reverse proxy detected – Security headers adjusted accordingly
config.https.connection_insecure: Insecure connection (HTTP) – Enable HTTPS for production use
config.llm.helper_disabled_banner: Helper LLM is disabled. Some features will be limited.
config.llm.helper_enabled_banner: Helper LLM is enabled and will be used for analysis and background tasks.
config.llm.helper_guardian_banner: LLM Guardian monitors and filters LLM inputs and outputs for safety.
config.llm.info_banner: Configure the main LLM that powers AuraGo. Model, API key and endpoint are managed via Provider settings.
config.llm.multimodal_banner: This model supports text and image inputs (multimodal).
config.n8n.info_text: Connect AuraGo with n8n to trigger workflows and receive webhook events. This enables bidirectional automation between AuraGo and your n8n workflows.
config.n8n.rate_limit_hint: Maximum incoming webhook requests per second.
config.n8n.readonly_hint: When enabled, n8n may read status, tools and memory, but write actions such as tool execution, memory storage and mission creation are blocked.
config.n8n.require_token_hint: Require a valid token for incoming webhook requests.
config.n8n.token_hint: Secret token for authenticating n8n webhook requests. Store this securely in your n8n credentials.
config.n8n.webhook_url_hint: Full n8n webhook URL that AuraGo should call for events, e.g. https://n8n.example.com/webhook/abc-123.
config.output_compression.api_label: Traceback frame filtering and Python output deduplication.
config.output_compression.disabled_desc: Tool outputs will not be compressed.
config.output_compression.filters_title: Error outputs are always preserved unchanged.
config.output_compression.info_desc: Compression runs before truncation and saves 40–70 % tokens.
config.output_compression.min_chars_desc: Only compress outputs exceeding this size (default: 500).
config.output_compression.note_limit: Null-field removal and JSON compaction for API responses.
config.output_compression.preserve_error: Outputs containing error markers will never be compressed.
config.output_compression.python_label: Git, Docker, kubectl, go test, pytest, grep, find, ls/tree filters.
config.output_compression.shell_label: Select which filter categories are active. Disabled categories use the generic filter.
config.restart.disconnected: Disconnected – waiting for AuraGo to restart…
config.restart.reloading: AuraGo is reloading. This page will refresh automatically.
config.save_bar.restart_needed: Saved – restart required to apply changes
config.section.output_compression.desc: Reduces token consumption by filtering and deduplicating tool outputs.
config.section.output_compression.label: Output Compression
config.security.title: Security Status
config.tools.warning_banner: ⚠️ These toggles control potentially dangerous capabilities. Only enable what you need.
help.n8n.enabled: Enable the n8n integration to connect AuraGo with your n8n workflows via webhooks.
config.section.heartbeat.label: Heartbeat
config.section.heartbeat.desc: Background wake-up scheduler that periodically checks for tasks, appointments, and emails.
config.heartbeat.additional_prompt_place: e.g. Also check system logs for critical errors...
config.heartbeat.info_banner: Heartbeat wakes the agent in configured time windows to check in the background if anything needs attention.
help.heartbeat.enabled: Enable the heartbeat scheduler to wake the agent periodically.
help.heartbeat.check_tasks: Check for open tasks and missions during each heartbeat.
help.heartbeat.check_appointments: Check for upcoming appointments and reminders during each heartbeat.
help.heartbeat.check_emails: Check configured email accounts for new messages during each heartbeat.
help.heartbeat.additional_prompt: Custom instructions for the agent to consider on every heartbeat wake-up.
help.heartbeat.day_time_window: Daytime period with its own check interval.
help.heartbeat.night_time_window: Nighttime period with its own (usually longer) check interval.
config.docker.managed_disabled_reason: Docker integration is disabled. Enable Docker before using managed Ollama containers.
config.docker.socket_missing_reason: Docker socket not detected. Mount /var/run/docker.sock or configure docker.host before using managed Ollama containers.
config.n8n.allowed_events_hint: One event name per line. AuraGo only sends these events to the configured n8n webhook.
config.n8n.allowed_tools_hint: Optional safety allow-list, one tool name per line. Leave empty to expose all enabled AuraGo tools.
config.n8n.scopes_hint: Optional scope allow-list, one scope per line. Leave empty to allow all n8n API operations.
config.n8n.status_hint: Checks the n8n integration status with the current AuraGo session.
config.yepapi.enabled_hint: Activate the YepAPI integration for SEO, SERP, scraping, and social media tools.
config.yepapi.seo_hint: Keyword research, domain overview, competitor analysis, backlinks, and on-page audits.
config.yepapi.serp_hint: Search engine results from Google, Bing, Yahoo, Baidu, and more.
config.yepapi.scraping_hint: Standard scrape, JavaScript rendering, stealth mode, screenshots, and AI extraction.
config.yepapi.youtube_hint: Search videos, get details, transcripts, comments, channels, playlists, and trending.
config.yepapi.tiktok_hint: Search videos and users, get profiles, posts, comments, music, and challenges.
config.yepapi.instagram_hint: Search users and hashtags, get profiles, posts, reels, comments, and hashtags.
config.yepapi.amazon_hint: Search products, get details by ASIN, read reviews, browse deals and best sellers.
config.yepapi.provider_desc: Select the provider that supplies your YepAPI key. The provider must be configured with type 'yepapi'.
config.yepapi.provider_help: If empty, the first provider with type 'yepapi' will be used automatically.
config.yepapi.disabled_desc: Enable YepAPI to access SEO, SERP, scraping, and social media tools.
config.yepapi.test_desc: Verify your YepAPI key is valid and the service is reachable.
config.yepapi.test_success: Connection successful — API key is valid.
config.yepapi.test_error: Connection failed — check your API key and provider settings.
config.yepapi.provider_info: YepAPI can also be used as an LLM provider. Configure it in the Providers section with type 'yepapi'.
